problem: What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics?
hypothesis: If Polymer crosslinking under specific stimulus is applied to fully, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
